details: controller_resource_audit.py compares HEAD only to the local refs/remotes/origin/main. A controller checkout can therefore report headBehindOriginMain=false when both local refs are stale while live origin/main has advanced. This can make optimizer/controller baseline evidence look current even when workbook, prompt, or workflow state is stale.

evidence.reproduction: Created a temporary bare origin and a local clone whose HEAD and refs/remotes/origin/main were both rewound to the first commit while the live origin refs/heads/main pointed to the second commit.

impact: Controllers may continue from stale main evidence and make stale workflow, queue, or dispatch recommendations until a manual fetch happens.
suggestedImprovement: When live remote checking is requested, compare the local remote-tracking SHA with a read-only live remote main SHA and warn without mutating refs.
summary: Resource audit misses stale remote-tracking refs
